# HDD/CDD Summary

This document summarizes the batch calculation results for all EPW weather stations under data/weather.

## Method

- Heating base temperature: 20.0 °C
- Cooling base temperature: 26.0 °C
- Formula: HDD = sum(max(0, T_base_h - T_out,h)) / 24
- Formula: CDD = sum(max(0, T_out,h - T_base_c)) / 24
- Input data: hourly dry-bulb temperature from each station EPW file

## Coverage

- Regions processed: 20
- Stations processed: 140

## Extremes

- Highest HDD station: ITA_VD_Pian.Valle d'Aosta (7425.83)
- Highest CDD station: ITA_PU_Taranto-Grottaglie.Apulia (278.22)
- Coldest region by mean HDD: VD (5230.97)
- Warmest region by mean CDD: PU (162.76)
